_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: immunolabeled for mitochondrial heat shock chaperone protein (Tid1, green)...Tid1 was retained for several hours after Y100 treatment but was reduced at the time points during which we observe Mitotracker Red hotspots
details: Successfully detected mitochondrial heat shock chaperone protein Tid1 reduction in Y100 treated cells with hotspots, showing Tid1 was retained for several hours but reduced at 8-24 hour timepoints
